headline_seed: McConnell speaks to Republican leaders as speculation swirls about his health, remains hospitalized - AP News
draft_text:
Sen. Mitch McConnell, 84, has been hospitalized more than three weeks. Senate Majority Leader Thune called it a "lengthy and substantive" phone call. Barrasso spoke with him 20 minutes Tuesday, AP and Politico report.

And that's the mews.
